# Contributing to Easyship AI Plugins & Skills

Thank you for your interest in contributing! This repo contains agent plugins for the Easyship MCP server.

## What you can contribute

- **Skills** — Improved agent instructions for shipping workflows
- **Rules** — Better guidelines for safe API usage
- **Bug reports** — Issues with the plugin structure or MCP configuration
- **Documentation** — README improvements, setup guides, examples

## What lives elsewhere

The MCP server source code (`easyship-mcp`) is maintained separately. If you have a bug report or feature request for the server itself (tools not working, API errors, missing endpoints), please contact [Easyship Support](https://www.easyship.com/contact).

## How to contribute

1. Fork this repository
2. Create a branch for your change
3. Make your changes
4. Test with at least one supported platform (Claude Code, Cursor, or Gemini CLI)
5. Open a pull request with a clear description of the change

## Guidelines

- Keep skills concise — LLMs read these as context, so every token counts
- Test your changes with a real Easyship API token before submitting
- Follow the existing file structure and frontmatter format
- Don't include API tokens or secrets in any files

## Questions?

Open an issue or reach out at [support@easyship.com](mailto:support@easyship.com).
